nodes.label: P8.0 — the bench: guards, live drift, well-posedness
partial_fit — streaming running-Gram primitive
nodes.rationale: The one genuinely-new Phase-8 primitive: a streaming running-(G,M) Gram accumulate with optional EMA-decay lambda_ema, then re-solve W, built because the chip maintains the namer's statistics as a running second moment on capacitors rather than a from-scratch re-solve; guarded to reproduce a batch fit bit-for-bit (4e-15 RanPAC / 2.2e-16 SLDA), turning 'drift-poisoning' from narration into measurement.

nodes.label: awake_sleep_loop — the live co-adapting harness
nodes.rationale: Dual-mode harness: block/oracle mode reproduces the frozen continual_safety_heads bit-for-bit (the guard + oracle-cadence reference); streaming mode is the real Phase-8 regime with a per-step awake gate and detector-driven sleep — anchors every downstream A6 number to the real live loop, not a frozen stand-in.
